steps.name: Given there is TeamOwner with team UpdateParticipantList on Staging backend
And User TeamOwner configures MLS for team UpdateParticipantList
And TeamOwner enables channel feature for team UpdateParticipantList via backdoor
And User TeamOwner adds users Member1,Member2 to team UpdateParticipantList with role Member
And TeamOwner adds a new device Device1 with label Device1
And Member1 adds a new device Device2 with label Device2
And TeamOwner has channel conversation UpdateList in team UpdateParticipantList
And User Member1 and Member2 are available for channel participant selection
And I see welcome screen before login
And I open staging deep link login flow
And I complete post-login permission and privacy prompts
Then I see conversation UpdateList in conversation list
When I tap on conversation name UpdateList in conversation list
And I tap on channel conversation title UpdateList to open group details
steps.statusMessage: Group conversation details for user 'UpdateList' did not open.
